headline: Why Dan Ives Maintains His Sky High Target on IBM After Its Largest Crash Ever
summary: IBM just suffered its worst single-week collapse since 1968, yet one prominent analyst refuses to budge from a price target that implies more than 60% upside. What he sees in the wreckage that the sellers are missing could reshape the entire enterprise AI trade.

headline: Can Private Cloud AI Business Sustain HPE's Enterprise Growth?
summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise's Private Cloud AI orders and record AI Systems backlog highlight rising enterprise demand for secure on-premises AI deployments.

headline: Hewlett Packard: A Record $6.3 Billion AI Backlog And A Cheap Valuation
summary: Hewlett Packard is transforming into a leading AI infrastructure company, poised to benefit from surging enterprise AI demand and potential stock re-rating. Learn more about HPE stock here.
